creator: fbsd@any.com.ru
text:
(In reply to Ben Woods from comment #0)
Some times ago I began to make the port of pfstools-2.0.5. However, at the moment Robertson photometric calibration method in the pfshdrcalibrate tool still does not work (it was broken since pfscalibration-1.5).
If you want to try pfstools-2.0.5 port in its current state, please look at attached file pfstools2.tar.bz2.
